remainingFiles.authorizationStatement: The repository maintainer stated on 2026-07-23 that FHH is the publishing party and that FHH-specific overlay material is authorized for publication.
evidence: Current overlay lineage includes rename commit e4f860e4bd255b5b15dab12201f82b1ae9d5483c on 2026-07-15.
A tracked-file review found no unclassified external source declaration outside externalPathCoverage; ordinary references and framework names are not treated as copied material.
remainingFiles.limitation: This is a maintainer authorization record, not independent proof of authorship. Legal counsel must decide whether it is sufficient for public release.
